summary: Ulip and Lady Isabel arrive at the Blue Wolf Squad's headquarters, where they plan to surrender. However, Ulip discovers that Lady Isabel is actually hiding a secret, and she reveals that the real enemy is Dean Verux, who has taken over the city. Ulip also learns about the concept of 'Aura Chains' and meets the Gold Lion, a powerful being who is said to be able to hold his own against any opponent.
key_moments: Ulip and Lady Isabel arrive at the Blue Wolf Squad's headquarters
Lady Isabel reveals her true intentions and the identity of the real enemy
Ulip learns about Aura Chains and meets the Gold Lion
